title: Persona
description: Canonical cross-runtime persona (Kickoff 5A). FROZEN wire format v1.0.0 — additive-only changes; any breaking change bumps the version directory. Mirrors phonegentic_events::persona::Persona.

name.description: Agent's name for self-introduction. null/absent = unnamed.

role.description: Base role sentence, e.g. "You are a voice AI agent…".

job_function.description: The job description (Dart AgentBootContext.jobFunction, a string).

text_only.description: Text-only (whisper) mode. Always false on the voice-only server runtime.

voice.description: TTS voice. NOTE: voice_id namespaces differ per engine (not portable across runtimes). Present but not yet wired to real TTS (5A is schema-only).

tools_enabled.description: Names of tools this persona allows. Empty until Kickoff 5B.

opening_line.description: Server runtime: spoken on answer before the first user utterance.

temperature.description: Server runtime: LLM sampling temperature. null = provider default.
